infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PickPack needs your location to track deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PickPack needs your location to track deliveries in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PickPack needs camera access for proof of delivery photos and QR scanning.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PickPack needs photo library access for proof of delivery.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PickPack to access your camera for QR scanning and proof of delivery.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow PickPack to use your location for delivery tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PickPack to access your photos for proof of delivery.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PickPack to take photos for proof of delivery.
